package com.example.service;

import java.io.*;
import java.nio.file.*;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.zip.ZipEntry;
import java.util.zip.ZipInputStream;

public class ZipService {
    
    public List<String> extractZipFile(String zipFilePath, String extractPath) {
        List<String> extractedFiles = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // Validate extraction directory
        File extractDir = new File(extractPath);
        if (!extractDir.exists()) {
            if (!extractDir.mkdirs()) {
                throw new RuntimeException("Failed to create extraction directory: " + extractPath);
            }
        } else if (!extractDir.isDirectory()) {
            throw new RuntimeException("Extraction path exists and is not a directory: " + extractPath);
        }

        // Get canonical extraction path
        Path extractPathPath = extractDir.toPath().toAbsolutePath().normalize();

        try (ZipInputStream zipInputStream = new ZipInputStream(new FileInputStream(zipFilePath))) {
            ZipEntry entry;
            while ((entry = zipInputStream.getNextEntry()) != null) {
                String fileName = entry.getName();
                
                // Skip empty names
                if (fileName == null || fileName.isEmpty()) {
                    zipInputStream.closeEntry();
                    continue;
                }

                // Resolve target path securely
                Path targetPath = extractDir.toPath().resolve(fileName).toAbsolutePath().normalize();

                // Validate path is within extraction directory
                if (!targetPath.startsWith(extractPathPath)) {
                    throw new IOException("Entry is outside of the target directory: " + fileName);
                }

                if (entry.isDirectory()) {
                    Files.createDirectories(targetPath);
                } else {
                    Files.createDirectories(targetPath.getParent());
                    Files.copy(zipInputStream, targetPath, StandardCopyOption.REPLACE_EXISTING);
                    extractedFiles.add(targetPath.toString());
                }

                zipInputStream.closeEntry();
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }

        return extractedFiles;
    }
}
</fixed_code>

import java.io.*;

 */
public class ZipService {
    
    /**
     * Extracts a ZIP file based on the provided ZIP file path and target extraction path, returning a list of extracted files
     * 
     * @param zipFilePath Path to the ZIP file

     * @return List of extracted files (absolute paths)
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if ZIP file doesn't exist or extraction path is invalid
     * @throws UncheckedIOException if extraction fails
     */
    public List<String> extractZipFile(String zipFilePath, String extractPath) {
        List<String> extractedFiles = new ArrayList<>();
        
        // Validate ZIP file
        File zipFile = new File(zipFilePath);
        if (!zipFile.isFile()) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("The provided path is not a file: " + zipFilePath);
        }
        
        // Resolve and validate extraction path
        Path extractPathObj = Paths.get(extractPath).toAbsolutePath().normalize();
        if (Files.exists(extractPathObj) && !Files.isDirectory(extractPathObj)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("The extraction path exists but is not a directory: " + extractPath);
        }
        
        // Create extraction directory if needed
        if (!Files.exists(extractPathObj)) {
            try {
                Files.createDirectories(extractPathObj);
            } catch (IOException e) {
                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
            }
        }
        
        try (ZipInputStream zipInputStream = new ZipInputStream(new FileInputStream(zipFilePath))) {
            ZipEntry entry;
            while ((entry = zipInputStream.getNextEntry()) != null) {
                // Resolve and normalize the entry path
                Path entryPath = extractPathObj.resolve(entry.getName()).normalize();
                
                // Security check: ensure entry is within target directory

                        Files.createDirectories(entryPath);
                        // Set last modified time if available
                        if (entry.getTime() != -1) {
                            try {
                                Files.setLastModifiedTime(entryPath, FileTime.fromMillis(entry.getTime()));
                            } catch (IOException e) {
                                // Ignore - filesystem doesn't support setting timestamps
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
                    }
                } else {
                    try {

                        Path parent = entryPath.getParent();
                        if (parent != null && Files.notExists(parent)) {
                            Files.createDirectories(parent);

                            }

                    } catch (IOException e) {
                        throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
                    }
                }
            }

            throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
        }

                String fileName = entry.getName();
                File file = new File(extractPath, fileName);
                
                // Security check: validate extraction path
                String fileCanonicalPath;
                try {
                    fileCanonicalPath = file.getCanonicalPath();
                } catch (IOException e) {
                    e.printStackTrace();
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Check if file is within base directory
                if (!fileCanonicalPath.startsWith(baseDirCanonicalPath)) {
                    continue; // Skip malicious entries
                }
                
                if (entry.isDirectory()) {
                    file.mkdirs();
                } else {
                    // Create parent directories
                    File parent = file.getParentFile();
                    if (parent != null && !parent.exists()) {
                        parent.mkdirs();
                    }
                    
                    // Write file content
                    try (FileOutputStream fos = new FileOutputStream(file)) {
                        byte[] buffer = new byte[1024];
                        int length;
                        while ((length = zipInputStream.read(buffer)) > 0) {
                            fos.write(buffer, 0, length);
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Add canonical path to result list
                    extractedFiles.add(fileCanonicalPath);
                }
                
                zipInputStream.closeEntry();
            }
        } catch (IOException e) {
            e.printStackTrace();
        }
        
        return extractedFiles;
    }
